description: 60-V, 6-A, 31-mΩ eFuse with Reverse Polarity Protection and Surge Protection

1.name: IN
1.description: Power input. Connects to the DRAIN of the internal FET.

2.name: IN
2.description: Power input. Connects to the DRAIN of the internal FET.

3.name: B_GATE
3.description: Blocking FET gate driver output. Connect B_GATE to GATE of the external NFET.

4.name: DRV
4.description: Blocking FET fast pulldown switch drive. Connect DRV to the GATE of external pulldown switch.

5.name: IN_SYS
5.description: Power input and supply voltage of the device. Short to IN if blocking FET is not used.

6.name: UVLO
6.description: Input for setting the programmable undervoltage lockout threshold. Connect to GND for default.

7.name: OVP
7.description: Input for setting the programmable overvoltage protection threshold. Connect to GND for default. (also: PLIM — Input for setting the programmable output power limiting threshold. Connect to GND if not used.)

9.name: dVdT
9.description: A capacitor from this pin to GND sets output voltage slew rate.

10.name: ILIM
10.description: A resistor from this pin to GND sets the overload and short-circuit current limit.

11.name: MODE
11.description: Mode selection pin for overload fault response.

12.name: SHDN
12.description: Shutdown pin. Pulling SHDN low makes the device to enter into low power shutdown mode.

13.name: IMON
13.description: Analog current monitor output. If unused, leave this pin floating.

14.name: FLT
14.description: Fault event indicator. Open drain output. If unused, leave floating or connect to GND.

16.name: PGOOD
16.description: Active High power good indicator. If unused, connect to GND or leave floating.

EP.name: PowerPAD
EP.description: Connect PowerPAD integrated circuit package to GND plane for heat sinking.
